_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=99 (set at 100.00 TOTAL after every mutant killed or marked equivalent via Stryker disable pragma — 1131 killed / 0 survived / 0 no-coverage across all 11 mutate-scope files; buffer 1.0 for flake budget). The ratchet is non-decreasing.
